description_long: This is a modern, boxy sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in a dark, likely black, material that appears to be either leather or faux leather. The sofa features two large, flat seat cushions and a continuous, straight backrest that wraps around to form the armrests, creating a uniform rectangular profile. The armrests are at the same height as the backrest, giving the piece a geometric, enclosed look. The legs are short, blocky, and positioned at the corners, providing sturdy support while maintaining a low profile. The upholstery has a subtle, fine texture, possibly a faint herringbone or woven pattern, visible on the exterior surfaces. This sofa would be well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A sleek, boxy black sofa with two large seat cushions, straight armrests, and a continuous backrest, upholstered in subtly textured material. The design is minimalist and modern, with short block legs at the corners.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat cushions, straight armrests, and the continuous backrest, highlighting the sofa's symmetrical and enclosed design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat, emphasizing the sofa's boxy profile and low, blocky leg.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the continuous, straight backrest and the subtle texture of the upholstery, with both armrests visible at the same height.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the straight armrest, seat depth, and the sofa's overall rectangular silhouette.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, flat seat cushions placed side by side; backrest is a single continuous padded section integrated with the armrests; cushions appear uniform in size and attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, straight, and at the same height as the backrest, forming a continuous rectangular enclosure; they are thick, boxy, and fully padded with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at each corner; legs are simple, likely made of wood or metal, and are exposed beneath the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is high, straight, and continuous, wrapping around to form the armrests; it is fully padded with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid black with a subtle, fine texture, possibly a faint herringbone or woven pattern; no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
